description: Dashboard data density overhaul: Add Hot Tickers panel, Fear & Greed indicator, Macro Snapshot cards, reorder sections (personas before datasource), and ensure mobile responsiveness
steps: 1. In dashboard/app.py, add a new API endpoint GET /api/hot-tickers that fetches real-time data for 8-10 hot tickers (AAPL, NVDA, TSLA, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, BTC-USD, ETH-USD, META, AMD). Use the existing yfinance-based pattern from fetch_market_overview. Return for each: symbol, name, price, change_pct, market_cap. Include caching with 60s TTL.

2. In dashboard/templates/index.html, add a '热门标的实时行情' section AFTER the market overview board. Show a grid of 8-10 ticker cards, each with: code, company name (Chinese), current price, change percentage with color coding (green up / red down), and a direction arrow. Load from /api/hot-tickers on page load.

3. In dashboard/templates/index.html, add a '恐慌与贪婪指标' section. Extract VIX value from the existing market overview data. Show: VIX value, US Dollar Index (DXY), US 10Y yield. Add a text judgment based on VIX ranges: VIX < 15 = '市场偏贪婪', 15-25 = '市场中性', > 25 = '市场偏恐慌'. Style as a compact card with a colored indicator.

4. In dashboard/templates/index.html, add a '宏观经济快照' section. Pull gold, oil, BTC from the existing market overview items and display them as independent compact cards with brief interpretive text (e.g., if gold is up significantly, show '避险需求上升').

5. Reorder sections in index.html: Hero -> Stats -> Market Overview -> Hot Tickers -> Fear & Greed + Macro Snapshot (side by side) -> Featured Personas -> Data Sources -> Recent Analyses -> How it Works.

6. In dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css, add CSS for the new sections: .hot-tickers-grid (responsive grid of ticker cards), .fear-greed-card, .macro-snapshot-grid. Ensure @media queries degrade gracefully: 4 cols -> 2 cols -> 1 col on mobile.
7. Update the version in base.html sidebar footer from v7.2.0 to v7.3.1. Add 'Powered by Augur v7.3.1' text in the footer area.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/hot-tickers returns JSON with 8-10 tickers including price and change_pct
index.html renders Hot Tickers, Fear & Greed, and Macro Snapshot sections
Featured Personas section appears BEFORE Data Sources section in the DOM order
All new sections are responsive (grid degrades on smaller screens)
base.html footer shows 'Powered by Augur v7.3.1'
findings: All implementation verified successfully. fetch_hot_tickers returns 10 tickers with real data. Import check passes. All 448 tests pass. Note: task instructions say do NOT commit (FEAT-003 handles final commit).
